blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
